raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu tee Laudis no A-
jas atpakak greesahs/ tad skat-
tijahs tee/ un raugi/ tur zehlahs
Duhini ta Pilsfahta prett Deb-
besi/ un teem ne bija ne kahdas
Weetas/ kurp tee/ jeb schurp jeb
turp behgtu/ jo tee Laudis/ kas
us Tukneſi behdse / atgreesahs
prett teem Pakkat-Dsinnejeim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Josuiis un wiſs
Israels redſeja ka tee/ kas flep-
peni turrejahs / to Pilsfahru bij
uhsxehmuſchi/ un ka tee Pilsfah-
ta Duhini zehlahs / atgreesahs
arridsan/ un kawe tohs Wihrus
no Ajas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tad nahze arridsan
winxi no ta Pilsfahta ahra teem
pretti/ ta ka tee Widdü starp I-
sraelu bija/ ſchee no tenneses/ un
winxi no turrenes / un tee kawe
tohs lihds ka neveens no teem at-
likke/ kas pahri paliftu / jeb iſ-
behgtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr to Kehnixu no
Ajas fagnhſtija tee dsihwu / un
wedde to pee Josuiis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Israels bija wiſ-
tus beidsts/ kas eekſch Ajas dsih-
woja/ nokaut/ Lauka/(un)Tuk-
neſi/ uhs kurrenes tee winnam
bija pakkatdsinnuschees/ un kad
wiſſi tee zaar Sohbixa Afminini
krittuſchi bija/ teekans tee isdel-
deti tappe/ tad atgreesahs wiſs
Israels uhs Aju / un fitte to ar
Sohbixa Atmini.
Un wiſſi/ kas tai Deena
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Josuiis ne atwiſke fo
wu Rohku / ko wiꞥſch ar t
Schkehpu bija iſſteepeis/ teekam
wiꞥſch wiſſus/ kas eekſch Aja
dsihwoja/ bija isdeldejis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tomehr Israels laupij
preeſch fewig tohs Lohpus / u
ta Pilsfahta Laupijumu/ pehz t
KUNGA Wahrdn / ko wiꞥſc
Jesuiim bij patwehlejts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Josuiis fadedsinaja Q
ju / un faſkahwe to par ween
Rohpu muhschan / par poht
Weetu lihdsſchai paſchai Deena
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Kehnixu no Aja
pakahre wiꞥſch pee kahda Koh
ka/ lihds Wakaram / un kad ta
Saule nogahje / patwehleja Jo
ſniis/ ka winna nomirrufi Mee
fa no ta Kohka noxemta taptu
un tee mette wiꞥſau pee Pilsfah-
ta-Wahrtu Durvim/ un uhs
krahwe pahr wiꞥſu weenu leeli
Akmiixo-Kohpu/kas wehl tur ir
lihdsſchai paſchai Deenai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad uhstaifija Josuii
weenu Altari tam KUNGAM
tam Israeka Deewain / us to
KalnuEebal.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ittin ka Mohsus ta
KUNGA Kalps/ teem Israeka
Behrneem bij patwehlejis/ itt ka
Mohsus Banſlibas-Grahmatā
rakstihts stahw/ weenu Altari na
weſſeleim Akmiizeem/ kur ne bija
Oscses Rihs peeſſts/ un us to
uppureja tee tam KUNGAM
Dedsa-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
